arts.ttl: Why Cole Palmer is not in Chelsea squad vs Gent for Europa Conference League clash
arts.sum: Cole Palmer is not injured or suspended, which will lead Chelsea fans to ask why he is not in the squad to take on Gent in Thursday's Europa Conference League opener. The decision to leave Palmer out was actually made a month ago, when Chelsea omitted him from their squad submission to UEFA .

arts.ttl: 'They had the possibility to': Chelsea had the chance to sell £250k-a-week player - Fabrizio Romano
Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea injuries, Robert Sanchez pressure, Cole Palmer reliance
arts.sum: Also, because I said after the game, usually we like to see the end part of the thing and that was a Robert mistake but the mistake started with Malo [Gusto] because we conceded a chance and then we conceded a goal. Last week against Barrow, I think they all did a very good game and hopefully tomorrow can do the same."

arts.ttl: Full Chelsea squad for Gent as Enzo Maresca reveals forgotten star's new role
arts.sum: The former Leicester City boss said: "I think Cesare did very well in that game [vs Barrow]. Chelsea head into the tie following a 4-2 win against Brighton in the Premier League at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard reveals the one job he 'couldn't turn down' as ex-Chelsea boss plots return
arts.sum: Former Chelsea manager Frank Lampard has been linked with a variety of roles since returning to Stamford Bridge on an interim basis briefly in 2023, but one stands out above all others for the England icon

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola accused of repeating Cole Palmer mistake at Man City - 'A real surprise player'
arts.sum: Has Manchester City boss messed up by allowing Liam Delap to leave after young striker started his Ipswich career in rich form?

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca challenges Chelsea's £140m misfits to get back to being 'big players' ahead of Conference League kick off as Blues boss prepares to hand chances to fringe stars
arts.sum: GEORGE BOND: Top scorer Cole Palmer, Romeo Lavia, Wesley Fofana and Ben Chilwell have all been left out of the squad for the Conference League league phase, which begins on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Maresca drops Chelsea team news hint in training before Gent clash
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters ahead of the Conference League tie, Casadei revealed that he decided to stay at Chelsea because he wants to force himself into Maresca's plans. Enzo Maresca has been putting his players through their paces at Cobham training ground ahead of Chelsea's clash against Gent.

arts.ttl: 'I could have completed Chelsea transfer exit - Enzo Maresca chat changed my mind'
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca helped persuade Blues midfielder Cesare Casadei to stay at the club this season and not go out on loan again, following spells at Reading and Leicester

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Gent injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa Conference League clash between Chelsea and Gent.
